rules.name: No construction near water bodies
rules.description: No new construction within 500m of a water body (Gujarat GDCR 2017, Section 12.3)
rules.legal_ref: Gujarat GDCR 2017 § 12.3 — Riverfront & Water Body Buffer Zone

rules.name: Minimum green cover in residential zones
rules.description: Green cover must not decrease below 30% (Gujarat TP Act § 22)
rules.legal_ref: Gujarat TP & UD Act 1976 § 22 — Development Plan Compliance

rules.name: No industrial activity in Zone A
rules.description: Industrial activity is prohibited in Zone A (Surat DP Zone Classification)
rules.legal_ref: SUDA Development Plan 2035 — Residential Zone R1 Restrictions

rules.name: Tapi Riverfront Buffer
rules.description: No construction within 500m of the Tapi riverfront (Surat specific)
rules.legal_ref: Surat GDCR — 500m Tapi Riverfront Buffer Zone Restriction

rules.name: Green Belt Encroachment
rules.description: No construction allowed on designated Green Belt land
rules.legal_ref: Gujarat GDCR 2017 § 15.1 — Protected Green Belt Zones
